rag_rules: Repair only validator diagnostics that are directly related to the current target component
Do not change unrelated architecture or add new components
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Ensure AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope
Ensure all guarantees have valid types
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Ensure AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool
anti_patterns: Do not use package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not add new components or change unrelated architecture
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
